description_long: This is a male adult dressed in a classic cowboy outfit, featuring a wide-brimmed hat, collared shirt, and fitted pants with a holster belt. He is holding a revolver in his right hand, and a holster with a pouch is strapped to his right hip. The figure has a beard and mustache, and his hair is tied back in a low ponytail. He wears sturdy boots suitable for rugged terrain, and his shirt is tucked neatly into his pants. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a Western gunslinger, with a confident and ready stance.
description: A male adult in a cowboy outfit with a hat, holster, revolver, and boots, styled as a Western gunslinger.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cowboy's face, shirt, holster, revolver, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the holster, revolver, and ponytail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hat, shirt, holster, and ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the holster pouch and the figure's profile.
attribute_clothing_type: Western-style collared shirt, fitted pants, wide-brimmed hat, and holster belt with pouch
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied in a low ponytail with facial hair
